query:
-- Misiorowski: o/u 6.5, best over +125 (BetMGM), best under -145 (Caesars)
UPDATE mlb_strikeout_props SET
  bookLine = '6.5',
  bookOverOdds = '+125',
  bookUnderOdds = '-145',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE gameId = 2250008 AND side = 'home';

-- Cade Cavalli: split line — best over o3.5 -154 (Caesars), best under u4.5 -200 (BetMGM)
-- Consensus line = 4.0 (midpoint), store best over at 3.5 and best under at 4.5
UPDATE mlb_strikeout_props SET
  bookLine = '4.0',
  bookOverOdds = '-154',
  bookUnderOdds = '-200',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE gameId = 2250009 AND side = 'away';

-- Matthew Boyd: o/u 5.5, best over +113 (Caesars), best under -148 (Caesars)
UPDATE mlb_strikeout_props SET
  bookLine = '5.5',
  bookOverOdds = '+113',
  bookUnderOdds = '-148',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE gameId = 2250009 AND side = 'home';
